summary: Base W12 — the §10 test week, reshaped 7-10 (Adj #145/#146): the 5K TT moved Fri → Sun 7-12 per athlete directive. The TT locks the goal tier (≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory) and formally recalibrates T pace after five straight T sessions quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge. Week so far: Mon ran hot (Adj #142); Tue Hyp A logged via the 7-10 dump — the §5 re-test set TM 162→168 (AMRAP 130×13) and incline bumps to 150 at W13 Tue, rear-delt 135 and pushdown 25 both landed (elbow clean, §10.A clock intact), preacher goes bump-eligible 70 (Adj #148–#154); the Wed pre-TT easy ran Thu on the treadmill — 30 min @ 10:20 honest Z1, strides skipped, fed, no pain anywhere, but HR 180 flat = the hottest easy-run read of the log (single data point, anchor by pace — Adj #145); Fri TT skipped. Saturday is full Hyp B including seated calf per athlete call — the calf runs last-set-only to failure with the TT <24 h out (Adj #135/#146). Sunday: 5K TT, full WU with 4 strides (first stride dose since W10 Mon). AM Achilles reads required both weekend days; elbow §10.A clock running from 7-4.

days.note: Logged — ran as off-protocol progression: ~3.4 mi / 30:00 @ 8:46 avg (9:16/8:58/8:09/8:23), HR 167 avg / 185 peak, felt chill. No pain anywhere — Adj #135 Achilles recheck satisfied (Adj #142/#143).

Logged (7-10 dump) — fed, AM all-clean. §5 re-test: 145×5 RIR 2 + AMRAP 130×13 RIR 0 → e1RM ~186, TM 162→168; incline bumps 150 at W13 Tue (Adj #148). Rear-delt 135 LANDED (Adj #153); preacher 65 cleanest outing → bump-eligible 70 (Adj #150); pushdown 25 landed, elbow fully clean (Adj #151); crunch +10 debut 12/8/8 — hold, rebuild (Adj #152); DB lat 30 hold (Adj #149).
Not run Wed — session displaced to Thu (Adj #145).

Logged — treadmill ~2.9 mi / 30:00 @ 10:20/mi honest Z1, cadence 173. Strides skipped. Fed; SI / Achilles / patellar clean AM/during/post. HR 180 flat = hottest easy read of the log — single data point, anchor by pace; next easy run 175+ avg at honest Z1 pace escalates (Adj #145).
SKIPPED — rescheduled to Sun 7-12 (Adj #146). Goal-tier lock and T-pace recalibration move with it.

days.session: Hyp B — full circuit incl. seated calf (athlete call)
days.note: Bumps: lat pulldown 160→165 on a clean set 3 (Adj #133); DB lateral 30→35 (Adj #137); decline crunch + small load at 3×10 (Adj #138). Holds: seated calf 345 — sets 1-3 RIR 1+, LAST SET ONLY to failure, TT <24 h out (Adj #135/#146); preacher 60 (Adj #139); chest fly 130 (Adj #140); pushdown 25 — landed Tue with a clean elbow, clean gate = set 3 RIR 1+ (Adj #151). AM Achilles read before lifting.

Goal tier locks: ≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory; 21:31–22:30 = downgrade to 20:59; >22:30 = downgrade to 21:30. Flat course or treadmill 1%, racing intent. Full WU: 15 min easy + 4×20 s strides. Recalibrates T pace. AM Achilles read pre-TT after Sat's calf dose — report an AM-sore read before racing (Adj #146). Do not renegotiate the tier later.
